Rules.InvariantScript:
Min(
    cmp_Measure_Titlebar.X + cmp_Measure_Titlebar.Height + gal_Measure_Select.TemplateHeight * CountRows(gal_Measure_Select.AllItems),
    App.Height - Self.Height
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Notes", Icon: Icon.Note, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People}
)
If(Self.Layout = Layout.Horizontal, Min(280, Self.Width - 60), Min(280, Self.Height - 60))

Table(
{Title: "Homeowner", Icon: Icon.Home, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Rooms", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Labour", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Materials", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Signatures", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Summary", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen},
{Title: "Final Steps", Icon: Icon.People, Screen: App.ActiveScreen}
)

Rules.InvariantScript:
With(
    {
        varRecordWindowMeasurement: If(
            ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
            LookUp(
                colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID
            ),
            Blank()
        )
    },
    If(
        !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'),
        "Mull " & varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number'
    )
    &
    If(
        !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Window Mull'.'Sequence Number')
        And !IsBlank(varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'),
        ", "
    )
    &
    If(
        varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.Yes
        Or varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Interior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.Yes,
        "Contains Lead",
        varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Exterior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.No
        Or varRecordWindowMeasurement.'Lead Test: Interior Result'=gblOptionSets.JobEntry.LeadTestResult.No,
        "No Lead",
        Blank()
    )
)

ThisItem.Image
/*
LookUp(
    colCdsWindowStyles,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowChoices,
        colCdsWindowChoices[@'Window Choice'] = ThisItem.'Window Choice'.'Window Choice',
        Style
    ).'Window Style' = colCdsWindowStyles[@'Window Style']
).Thumbnail.Value
*/

And(
    ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID,
        Completed
    ) = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Completed.Yes
)

And(
    ThisItem.Category="Window Measurement",
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Window Measurement'=ThisItem.ID,
        Completed
    ) = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Completed.Yes
)

"Measure: "&Concatenate(
    "UI = ",
    Text(
        RoundUp(
            gblMeasurementWidthWhole + gblMeasurementWidthFraction + gblMeasurementHeightWhole + gblMeasurementHeightFraction,
            0
        )
    ),
    " (Max ",
    Text(gblRecordWindowChoice.'Max UI'),
    ")"
)

If(
    ThisItem.Value = "Mull/De-mull",
    ClearCollect(
        colJobEntriesForMullMenu,
        Filter(
            colCdsJobEntries,
            Job.Job = gblRecordJobCurrent.Job,
            'Room: Type' = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Room: Type',
            'Room: Floor' = gblRecordJobEntryCurrent_.'Room: Floor',
            Status <> gblOptionSets.JobEntry.Status.Inactive
        )
    );
    Clear(colProjectSidebarWindowMulls);
    ForAll(
        colJobEntriesForMullMenu As currentJobEntry,
        Collect(
            colProjectSidebarWindowMulls,
            Ungroup(
                Table(
                    {
                        varMenuItems: RenameColumns(
                            Table(
                                {
                                    ID: currentJobEntry.'Job Entry',
                                    Name: Index(
                                        ForAll(
                                            Split(
                                                currentJobEntry.'Window Choice'.Name,
                                                " > "
                                            ),
                                            {Result: ThisRecord.Value}
                                        ),
                                        2
                                    ).Result,
                                    Category: "Job Entry",
                                    Description: Index(
                                        ForAll(
                                            Split(
                                                currentJobEntry.'Window Choice'.Name,
                                                " > "
                                            ),
                                            {Result: ThisRecord.Value}
                                        ),
                                        1
                                    ).Result,
                                    Screen: 'Windows Screen',
                                    Type: "Window Choice",
                                    Image: 'dblhungw-2',
                                    ImageDisabled: 'dblhungw-2'
                                }
                            ),
                            Name,
                            Title
                        )
                    },
                    {
                        varMenuItems: ShowColumns(
                            RenameColumns(
                                AddColumns(
                                    Filter(
                                        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
                                        'Job Entry'.'Job Entry' = currentJobEntry.'Job Entry',
                                        Type = gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Type.Tech,
                                        Status <> gblOptionSets.WindowMeasurement.Status.Inactive
                                    ),
                                    Category,
                                    "Window Measurement",
                                    Description,
                                    If(
                                        And(
                                            'United Inches (UI)' = 0,
                                            !IsBlank(currentJobEntry.'Measurement (Sales)')
                                        ),
                                        "Sales Measurement",
                                        "Tech Measurement"
                                    ),
                                    Image,
                                    gblAppIcons.Ruler,
                                    ImageDisabled,
                                    gblAppIcons.RulerDisabled,
                                    Screen,
                                    'Measure Window Screen',
                                    Title,
                                    If(
                                        And(
                                            'United Inches (UI)' = 0,
                                            !IsBlank(currentJobEntry.'Measurement (Sales)')
                                        ),
                                        $"{Text(currentJobEntry.'Measurement (Sales)'.Width)}"" x {Text(currentJobEntry.'Measurement (Sales)'.Height)}""",
                                        $"{RoundDown(
                                            Width,
                                            0
                                        )} {Switch(
                                            Mod(
                                                Width,
                                                1
                                            ),
                                            0,
                                            "",
                                            0.125,
                                            "1/8",
                                            0.250,
                                            "1/4",
                                            0.375,
                                            "3/8",
                                            0.500,
                                            "1/2",
                                            0.625,
                                            "5/8",
                                            0.750,
                                            "3/4",
                                            0.875,
                                            "7/8"
                                        )}"" x {RoundDown(
                                            Height,
                                            0
                                        )} {Switch(
                                            Mod(
                                                Height,
                                                1
                                            ),
                                            0,
                                            "",
                                            0.125,
                                            "1/8",
                                            0.250,
                                            "1/4",
                                            0.375,
                                            "3/8",
                                            0.500,
                                            "1/2",
                                            0.625,
                                            "5/8",
                                            0.750,
                                            "3/4",
                                            0.875,
                                            "7/8"
                                        )}"""
                                    )
                                ),
                                'Window Measurement',
                                ID
                            ),
                            ID,
                            Title,
                            Category,
                            Description,
                            Screen,
                            Image,
                            ImageDisabled
                        )
                    }
                ),
                varMenuItems
            )
        )
    );
    ClearCollect(
        colProjectSidebarWindowMulls,
        Filter(
            colProjectSidebarWindowMulls,
            !IsBlank(Title)
        )
    );
    Clear(colJobEntriesForMullMenu);
);
Navigate(
    ThisItem.Screen,
    BorderStyle.None
);
Set(
    gblRecordWindowMeasurement_Tech,
    LookUp(
        colCdsWindowMeasurements,
        'Window Measurement' = gblProjectSidebarItemCurrent.ID
    )
);

If(
    tog_Measure_Exception.Value,
    ForAll(
        Sequence(200),
        {tblValue: Value}
    ),
    Switch(
        locShowMeasurement,
        "Width",
        Filter(
            colMeasureWidth,
            tblValue < (gblMeasurementMaxUI - RoundUp(
                gblMeasurementHeightWhole + gblMeasurementHeightFraction,
                0
            ))
        ),
        "Jamb Depth",
        colMeasureJambDepth,
        "Soffit Depth",
        colMeasureSoffitDepth
    )
)

With(
    {
        varDefault: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Width",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureWidth,
                tblValue = RoundUp(
                    ((Max(
                        colMeasureWidth,
                        tblValue
                    ) + Min(
                        colMeasureWidth,
                        tblValue
                    )) / 2),
                    0
                )
            ),
            "Jamb Depth",
            First(colMeasureJambDepth),
            "Soffit Depth",
            First(colMeasureSoffitDepth)
        ),
        varActualTech: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Width",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureWidth,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementWidthWhole
            ),
            "Jamb Depth",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureJambDepth,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementJambDepthWhole
            ),
            "Soffit Depth",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureSoffitDepth,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementSoffitDepthWhole
            )
        ),
        varActualSales: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Width",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureWidth,
                tblValue = RoundDown(
                    gblRecordWindowMeasurement_Sales.Width,
                    0
                )
            ),
            Blank()
        )
    },
    Coalesce(
        varActualTech,
        varActualSales,
        varDefault
    )
)

If(
    Switch(
        locShowMeasurement,
        "Width",
        gblMeasurementWidthWhole,
        "Jamb Depth",
        gblMeasurementJambDepthWhole,
        "Soffit Depth",
        gblMeasurementSoffitDepthWhole
    )=ThisItem.tblValue,
    RGBA(
        0,
        0,
        0,
        0.4
    ),
    RGBA(
        0,
        0,
        0,
        .1
    )
)
locBlockUserInput Or locShowMeasurement in ["","Height", "Max Projection", "Wall Thickness"]

If(
    tog_Measure_Exception.Value,
    colMeasurementFractions,
    Filter(
        colMeasurementFractions,
        valIncrement <= (gblMeasurementMaxUI - ( gblMeasurementHeightWhole + gblMeasurementHeightFraction + gblMeasurementWidthWhole))
    )
)

If(
    Switch(
        locShowMeasurement,
        "Width",
        LookUp(colMeasurementFractions, valIncrement=gblMeasurementWidthFraction, valLabel),
        "Jamb Depth",
        LookUp(colMeasurementFractions, valIncrement=gblMeasurementJambDepthFraction, valLabel),
        "Soffit Depth",
        LookUp(colMeasurementFractions, valIncrement=gblMeasurementSoffitDepthFraction, valLabel)
    )=ThisItem.valLabel,
    RGBA(
        0,
        0,
        0,
        0.4
    ),
    RGBA(
        0,
        0,
        0,
        .1
    )
)

If(
    tog_Measure_Exception.Value,
    ForAll(
        Sequence(300),
        {tblValue: Value}
    ),
    Switch(
        locShowMeasurement,
        "Height",
        Filter(
            colMeasureHeight,
            tblValue < (gblMeasurementMaxUI - RoundUp(
                gblMeasurementWidthWhole + gblMeasurementWidthFraction,
                0
            ))
        ),
        "Max Projection",
        colMeasureMaxProjection,
        "Wall Thickness",
        colMeasureWallThickness
    )
)

With(
    {
        varDefault: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Height",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureHeight,
                tblValue = RoundUp(
                    ((Max(
                        colMeasureHeight,
                        tblValue
                    ) + Min(
                        colMeasureHeight,
                        tblValue
                    )) / 2),
                    0
                )
            ),
            "Max Projection",
            First(colMeasureMaxProjection),
            "Wall Thickness",
            First(colMeasureWallThickness)
        ),
        varActualTech: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Height",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureHeight,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementHeightWhole
            ),
            "Max Projection",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureMaxProjection,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementMaxProjectionWhole
            ),
            "Wall Thickness",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureWallThickness,
                tblValue = gblMeasurementWallThicknessWhole
            )
        ),
        varActualSales: Switch(
            locShowMeasurement,
            "Height",
            LookUp(
                colMeasureHeight,
                tblValue = RoundDown(
                    gblRecordWindowMeasurement_Sales.Height,
                    0
                )
            ),
            Blank()
        )
    },
    Coalesce(
        varActualTech,
        varActualSales,
        varDefault
    )
)

If(
    Switch(
        locShowMeasurement,
        "Height",
        LookUp(colMeasureHeight, tblValue=gblMeasurementHeightWhole, tblValue),
        "Max Projection",
        LookUp(colMeasureMaxProjection, tblValue=gblMeasurementMaxProjectionWhole, tblValue),

        LookUp(colMeasureWallThickness, tblValue=gblMeasurementWallThicknessWhole, tblValue)

    ),

)

)
